g.text: * Battery soft-disconnect resistor. If un-populated, it does not

g.desc: * Battery soft-disconnect resistor. If un-populated, it does not

g.text: disconnect the battery per se, it just prevents the battery charger

g.desc: disconnect the battery per se, it just prevents the battery charger

g.text: from sensing the battery's presence and voltage, and therefore

g.desc: from sensing the battery's presence and voltage, and therefore

g.text: * The board will still work with external/USB power, but won't charge.

g.desc: * The board will still work with external/USB power, but won't charge.

g.text: Hopefully, if un-populated, it will remove any battery-powered

g.desc: Hopefully, if un-populated, it will remove any battery-powered

g.text: quiescent power consumption from the system, which could work as an

g.desc: quiescent power consumption from the system, which could work as an

g.text: even lower-powered form of ship mode, once said mode is activated.

g.desc: even lower-powered form of ship mode, once said mode is activated.

g.text: A new revision of this board will replace this resistor with a switch

g.desc: A new revision of this board will replace this resistor with a switch

g.text: [input-battery] Battery Input: Connectors, Protections and Fuel Gauge

g.desc: [input-battery] Battery Input: Connectors, Protections and Fuel Gauge
